Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 3, 102 [Enuma Anu Enlil Varia][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
oo NaN  (start of obverse missing)
o 1'o 1'

x x x [...]

(o 1') ... [...] until the Sun [...].

o 2'2'

a-di-i dUTU mul₂[...]

o 3'3'

ki-i mul₂MAŠ.MAŠ a-na ziq-⸢pi⸣ [...]

(o 3') If the Twins [...] at the culmination [...] the Great Twins, Orion [...] until the sun [...] Orion: [...].

o 4'4'

mul₂MAŠ.TAB.BA GAL.GAL mul₂SIPA.[ZI.AN.NA ...]

o 5'5'

a-di-i dUTU mul₂SIPA.ZI.AN.⸢NA⸣ [...]

o 6'6'

ki-i mul₂ALLA a-na ziq-pi GUBzu-⸢ma⸣ [...]

(o 6') If the Crab stands at the culmination and [...] the Crab, the Arrow [...] until the Sun reaches the Crab: its interpretation (is that) the eclipse [...].

o 7'7'

mul₂ALLA mul₂KAK.SI.SA₂ [...]

o 8'8'

a-di-i dUTU mul₂ALLA KURad₂ pi-šer₃-ša₂ AN.[GE₆ ...]

o 9'9'

ki-i mul₂UR.GU.LA a-na ziq-pi GUBzu-ma [...]

(o 9') If the Lion stands at the culmination and [...] the Lion, the Snake [...] until the Sun reaches the Lion: its interpretation (is that) the eclipse will not [...].

o 10'10'

mul₂UR.A mul₂dMUŠ [...]

o 11'11'

a-di-i dUTU mul₂UR.A KURad₂ pi-šer₃-ša₂ AN.GE₆ ⸢ul⸣ [...]

o 12'12'

ki-i mul₂a-ru₆ a-na ziq-pi GUBzu-ma d30 AN.GE₆ [u₂]-⸢šar⸣-ru-[u₂]

(o 12') If the Frond stands at the culmination and an eclipse of the Moon begins, the Frond, the Furrow, Nabu and the King until the Sun reaches the Furrow: its interpretation (is that) the (solar) eclipse will not begin.

o 13'13'

mul₂a-ru₆ mul₂ABSIN dMUATI u dLUGAL

o 14'14'

a-di-i dUTU mul₂ABSIN KURad₂ pi-šer₃-ša₂ AN.GE₆ ul u₂-šar-ra-a

o 15'15'

ki-i mul₂ŠU.PA a-na ziq-pi GUBzu-ma d30 ⸢AN.GE₆⸣ u₂-šar-ru-u₂

(o 15') If ŠU.PA stands at the culmination and an eclipse of the Moon begins, ŠU.PA, the Scales, Šarur, Šargaz, until the Sun reaches the Scales: its interpretation (is that) the (solar) eclipse will begin.

o 16'16'

mul₂ŠU.PA mul₂GIŠ.RIN₂ dŠAR₂.UR₄ dŠAR₂.GAZ

o 17'17'

a-di-i dUTU mulGIŠ.RIN₂ KURad₂ pi-⸢šer₃⸣-[ša₂ AN].GE₆ u₂-šar-[ra]-a

o 18'18'

ki-i mul₂kip-pat ana ziq-pi GUBzu-ma d30 AN.GE₆ u₂-⸢šar-ru⸣-u₂

(o 18') If the Circle star stands at the culmination and an eclipse of the Moon begins [...].

r 33

[...] a-na ziq-pi ⸢GUBzu-ma⸣ [...]

(r 3) [...] stands at the culmination and [...] the Eagle [...] the Sun reaches the Goatfish: its interpretation (is that) [...] ... the eclipse of the Moon shows you [...] concerning [...].

(r 8) [...] Jupiter or Venus or ... [...] or Saturn approaches the Moon or [...] see [...] of the culmination. In accordance with this wording ... [...] its interpretation is not [...].
